item.title: Dyson PencilVac Review (2026): Limited but Handy
item.description: Dyson's latest stick vacuum has a sleek design and limitations, but remains useful.

item.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
item.description: Meta has acquired many of Amazon's homegrown CPUs for AI workloads, signaling a new chip race.

item.title: The Best Cordless Vacuums for Your Whole House (2026)
item.description: Clean your house without the constraint of a power cord with these cordless stick vacuums.

item.title: VMax New V4 Electric Scooter Review: Unleash the Beast
item.description: VMax's new electric scooter has a secret menu that lets you unlock the top speed and engage cruise control.

item.title: They Wanted to Join Raya. They've Been on the Waiting List for Years
item.description: The exclusive dating app Raya has become nearly impossible to join, with some applicants waiting years.
